title: Russian Carrot Soup
description: A hearty and comforting soup made with carrots and a hint of Russian spices. Serve with a swirl of sour cream for added richness.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the carrots and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the peppery and russian spices and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the soup and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until smooth.
Return the pot to medium heat and add 1 cup of heavy cream.
Stir to combine and cook until heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs.
